contact.creation.description: Triggered when a new contact is created in HubSpot

contact.deletion.description: Triggered when a contact is deleted

contact.propertyChange.description: Triggered when a property value is changed on a contact record

contact.merge.description: Triggered when two contact records are merged together

company.creation.description: Triggered when a new company is created in HubSpot

company.deletion.description: Triggered when a company is deleted

company.propertyChange.description: Triggered when a property value is changed on a company record

company.merge.description: Triggered when two company records are merged together

deal.creation.description: Triggered when a new deal is created in HubSpot

deal.deletion.description: Triggered when a deal is deleted

deal.propertyChange.description: Triggered when a property value is changed on a deal record (e.g. deal stage change)

deal.merge.description: Triggered when two deal records are merged together

ticket.creation.description: Triggered when a new ticket is created in HubSpot

ticket.deletion.description: Triggered when a ticket is deleted

ticket.propertyChange.description: Triggered when a property value is changed on a ticket record

ticket.merge.description: Triggered when two ticket records are merged together

conversation.creation.description: Triggered when a new conversation thread is created in the inbox

conversation.newMessage.description: Triggered when a new message is added to a conversation thread

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this specific event

subscriptionId.description: The ID of the webhook subscription that matched this event

portalId.description: The HubSpot account ID (portal ID) where the event occurred

appId.description: The ID of the HubSpot app that is receiving the webhook

occurredAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the event occurred

subscriptionType.description: The subscription type that identifies the event (e.g. contact.creation, deal.propertyChange)

attemptNumber.description: The number of delivery attempts made for this event, starting from 0

objectId.description: The ID of the CRM object that was affected (contact, company, deal, or ticket ID)

propertyName.description: The internal name of the property that was changed (present only for propertyChange events)

propertyValue.description: The new value of the property after the change (present only for propertyChange events)

changeSource.description: The source of the change (e.g. CRM_UI, API, IMPORT, INTEGRATION, WORKFLOW)
